sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15478" key="a)rrenopreph/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρρενο-πρεπής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n15478.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">befitting men, manly,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2054.tlg001:2:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.13</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
